# BlackRoad OS
> Sovereign agent operating system. Self-hosted AI infrastructure on Raspberry Pi clusters. Zero cloud dependency. Your AI. Your Hardware. Your Rules.

BlackRoad OS is a distributed AI platform founded by Alexa Louise Amundson (Delaware C-Corp, Nov 2025). It runs 27 AI agents on a Raspberry Pi fleet with 26 TOPS of Hailo-8 acceleration, 509 open-source repositories across 17 GitHub orgs, and 20 custom domains. Alternative to cloud AI services at 50% the price with full data sovereignty.

## Products
- [BlackRoad OS](https://blackroad.io): Sovereign agent operating system. Self-hosted AI on Raspberry Pi clusters. 50 AI skills, 5 nodes, 26 TOPS. The complete alternative to cloud AI.
- [RoadChat / RoadTrip](https://roadtrip.blackroad.io): Multi-agent AI chat hub. 69+ agents, 15+ Ollama models (Mistral, Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen), streaming responses. Free alternative to ChatGPT.
- [RoadCode](https://roadcode.blackroad.io): AI-powered coding platform. Monaco editor, 27 local AI models, integrated terminal. Alternative to GitHub Copilot with full privacy.
- [RoadSearch / RoadView](https://roadview.blackroad.io): Verified search engine with AI answers and fact-checking. D1 FTS5, no ads, no tracking.
- [RoadTutor / Roadie](https://roadie.blackroad.io): AI tutoring platform. Personalized learning with local models. Math, code, science, writing.
- [BlackRoad Auth](https://auth.blackroad.io): Sovereign authentication API. D1-backed, PBKDF2, JWT. Zero third-party dependency.
- [RoadPay](https://roadcoin.blackroad.io): Payments and subscriptions. Stripe integration for BlackRoad ecosystem.
- [RoadCoin](https://roadcoin.io): Compute credits for the BlackRoad mesh. Earn by contributing compute, spend on AI inference.
- [RoadChain](https://roadchain.io): Immutable agent action ledger. Every AI decision hash-chained into tamper-proof audit trail.
- [BlackBoard](https://blackboard.blackroad.io): Collaborative AI canvas and whiteboard.
- [Cadence](https://cadence.blackroad.io): AI-powered task and project management.
- [RoadRadio](https://radio.blackroad.io): AI-generated music and streaming radio.
- [RoadWorld](https://roadworld.blackroad.io): Pixel-art virtual world and browser-based game.
- [HQ Dashboard](https://hq.blackroad.io): BlackRoad headquarters. System status, analytics, control center.
- [Empire Search](https://products.blackroad.io): Unified search across all 590 BlackRoad products, agents, repos, domains, and orgs.

## AI Agents
- [Alice](https://aliceqi.com): Gateway agent. DNS, Pi fleet leader, network routing, main ingress.
- [Lucidia](https://lucidia.earth): Cognition engine. Persistent memory, multi-model reasoning, philosophical synthesis.
- [Cecilia](https://blackroad.systems): Hailo-8 AI acceleration, ML inference, 13 TOPS.
- [Octavia](https://blackroad.systems): Compute node, Docker Swarm, 26 TOPS Hailo-8 acceleration.
- [Aria](https://blackroad.network): Edge node, mesh networking, NATS messaging.
- [Road](https://roadtrip.blackroad.io): Primary AI assistant and orchestrator.
- [RoundTrip Hub](https://roundtrip.blackroad.io): Live registry of all 69+ BlackRoad agents.

## Infrastructure
- [BlackRoad Network](https://blackroad.network): Mesh carrier network. WireGuard VPN, Pi-hole DNS, 5 access points.
- [BlackRoad Systems](https://blackroad.systems): Distributed computing. Docker Swarm, Hailo-8 AI acceleration, edge computing.
- [BlackRoad AI](https://blackroadai.com): 50 AI skills, 27 local models, 26 TOPS. Zero cloud dependency.
- [BlackRoad Identity](https://blackroad.me): Sovereign identity and authentication platform.

## Pricing
- Operator: Free — 3 agents, 5 AI skills, community support
- Pro: $29/month — 10 agents, 25 skills, priority queue
- Sovereign: $199/month — unlimited agents + skills, dedicated Pi node
- Enterprise: Custom — white-label, SLA, dedicated hardware

## Key Use Cases
BlackRoad OS solves: self-hosted AI, sovereign AI infrastructure, local LLM deployment, AI agents on Raspberry Pi, ChatGPT alternative, GitHub Copilot alternative, private AI platform, edge AI inference, multi-agent systems, AI compute credits.

- [Product Directory](https://products.blackroad.io): Search all 590 BlackRoad products, agents, repos, domains, orgs
- [GitHub Orgs](https://github.com/BlackRoadOS): Primary GitHub organization (65+ repos)
- [BlackRoad README](https://github.com/BlackRoad-README): Documentation and guides
- [Company](https://blackroad.company): BlackRoad OS, Inc. — Delaware C-Corp, founded Nov 2025
